⚕️Clinical Professional Disclaimer

Please read carefully before proceeding

⚠ RESTRICTED USE — For use by licensed physicians, nurses, pharmacists, and qualified clinical practitioners only.

This application is a clinical decision-support reference based on:

  • ESC/ESH 2023 Hypertension Guidelines
  • ADA Standards of Medical Care in Diabetes (2024)
  • ACC/AHA 2013 Pooled Cohort Equations
  • ESC/ESH Guidelines on Hypotension Management
This application does not constitute medical advice, does not replace clinical judgment, and has not been certified as a medical device. All patient management decisions must be made by a qualified healthcare professional.
By continuing, you confirm you are a licensed or supervised healthcare professional using this tool for clinical reference purposes only.
🏥

This tool is for Healthcare Professionals

This clinical decision-support application is designed for licensed physicians, nurses, pharmacists, and qualified clinical practitioners. If you have questions about your health, please consult your doctor.

📞 Emergency: Call 911 or your local emergency number
🏥 Or visit your nearest Emergency Department
The Triad v3.1
HTN · Hypotension · DM · Sepsis · Paediatrics · Renal
A pocket-sized clinical reference for healthcare professionals — covering the most interconnected conditions at the bedside: Hypertension, Hypotension, Diabetes, Sepsis, Paediatrics, Renal Medicine, and a comprehensive Drug Reference. Built on current international guidelines.

No app store. Just tap the link and use — on any device.
What's Inside
🫀Hypertension — 13 tabs: classification, treatment algorithm, CVA protocol, ASCVD calculator, BP tracker, med checker, special populations, ANC Assessment
💉Hypotension — 7 tabs: shock protocol, vasopressor guide, orthostatic management, fluid strategy, prevention
🩸Diabetes — 11 tabs: T1DM, T2DM, glycaemic targets, insulin guide, insulin chart, BG tracker, complications, glycaemic emergencies (DKA, HHS, hypoglycaemia)
🔗Combined View — Shared drugs, aligned targets, dual-benefit lifestyle table
💊Drug Reference — 16 tabs: antihypertensives, vasopressors, antidiabetics, insulin calculator, emergency meds, IV fluids, interactions, drugs in pregnancy, psychiatry, antibiotics, electrolytes, analgesics, resp & GI, cardio & endocrine, neuro & MSK, antimalarials
🦠Sepsis — 6 tabs: Overview, qSOFA & SOFA, Hour-1 Bundle, Empiric Antibiotics, Severity Guide, Investigations
🧒Paediatrics — 10 tabs: Drug doses, Normal values, DKA Protocol (BSPED 2020), Neonatal Resus (NLS 2021), Fluid Guide, ABCDE Assessment, Malaria & Fever, Convulsions, Malnutrition, Sickle Cell
🫘Renal — 6 tabs: eGFR Calculator (CKD-EPI 2021), CKD Staging (KDIGO 2024), AKI Protocol, Complications, Dialysis Indications, Drug Dose Adjustment
Clinical Guidelines
◆ ESC/ESH 2023 Hypertension Guidelines
◆ ADA Standards of Medical Care in Diabetes 2024
◆ Surviving Sepsis Campaign (SSC) Guidelines 2021
◆ BSPED Paediatric DKA Guideline 2020
◆ KDIGO CKD Guideline 2024
◆ Resuscitation Council UK NLS 2021
◆ AAP Pediatric Hypertension Guidelines 2017
◆ NHLBI DASH Diet & ACSM Exercise Guidelines
◆ ACC/AHA Pooled Cohort Equations 2013
◆ BNF for Children (BNFC) 2023–2024
Created By
Gbenga Adejuyigbe
RN, BNSc
Version 3.1 · 2026 · Built from scratch — no frameworks, no app store
⚠ Disclaimer: The Triad is for licensed or supervised healthcare professionals only. It does not constitute medical advice, does not replace clinical judgment, and has not been certified as a medical device. Always verify against current local guidelines.
Welcome to
The Triad v3.1
HTN · Hypotension · Diabetes · Sepsis · Paediatrics · Renal

A clinical reference tool built for the entire healthcare team — nurses, interns, physicians, and consultants alike.

The Triad does not replace clinical judgment. It puts the right information at your fingertips — faster — so you can focus on what matters most: your patient.

⚕️ For licensed or supervised healthcare professionals only. Always apply clinical judgment and defer to your institution's protocols.
